title: AI in Graphic Design: Keeping the Human Touch
description: AI can speed up creative work, but designers still need to own the judgment, typography, brand meaning, and human touch that make design valuable.
section_headings: Why AI in Graphic Design Is Everywhere Right Now; What Designers Are Actually Afraid of Losing; AI as a Partner, Not a Replacement; What AI Should Never Replace in Graphic Design; Where AI and Human Creativity Are Heading Together; The Line Designers Need to Draw
